name: huntington-beach
description: Plan-check skills for Huntington Beach, CA — simple permits with HBMC local amendments. Currently includes reroof, EV charger, and water heater. Works in two modes: (A) Builder/Homeowner — intake → compliance check → submission guide for the Accela portal; (B) City Reviewer — runs plan-check checklist against a submittal and produces tight corrections output. Tier 1 (vetted).
